task: What is our API rate limit and where is it enforced? The existing notes may be out of date — verify against the code and fix anything wrong.

input.learning: API rate limit is 1000 requests/min, enforced by checkLimit in src/limits.js via the MAX_PER_MIN constant. Raised from the previous 100/min cap.

input.evidence: src/limits.js:2 sets const MAX_PER_MIN = 1000; checkLimit returns count <= MAX_PER_MIN.
